title: inspect container throw error
body:
### Issue Description

`/libpod/containers/{name}/json` Throw Error:

```
INFO[0000] podman filtering at log level debug          
DEBU[0000] Called rm.PersistentPreRunE(podman --debug rm -f e8db98497af7) 
DEBU[0000] SSH Ident Key "/Users/yleaf/.oomol-studio/.containers/.ssh/oomol-1.0.0" SHA256:Ka8dVHXl7UY7OxCXFBIKxI5KcL9NV7nTiaAQrheQIAI ssh-ed25519 
DEBU[0000] DoRequest Method: GET URI: http://d/v4.6.0/libpod/_ping 
DEBU[0000] DoRequest Method: GET URI: http://d/v4.6.0/libpod/containers/json 
DEBU[0000] DoRequest Method: GET URI: http://d/v4.6.0/libpod/containers/e8db98497af7/json 
Error: getting graph driver info "e8db98497af74d5a92f88f658d262061b50d35bccfe64245b06120798341c297": readlink /var/home/core/.local/share/containers/storage/overlay: invalid argument
```

### Steps to reproduce the issue

I am not sure how to reproduce this issue. The issue occurred after I restarted my computer.

### Describe the results you received

```
Error: getting graph driver info "e8db98497af74d5a92f88f658d262061b50d35bccfe64245b06120798341c297": readlink /var/home/core/.local/share/containers/storage/overlay: invalid argument
```

### Describe the results you expected

Success remove container

### podman info output

```yaml
Podman version: [384638861b9245b57fca0d4430e5732f529af8a3](https://github.com/containers/podman/tree/384638861b9245b57fca0d4430e5732f529af8a3)

OS: MacOS M1
```


### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Rootless

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

_No response_

### Additional information

### Client Logs:


comments.body: I tried `stop/start` the machine, but the problem still persisted. However, when I remove the machine and recreated it, the problem was resolved.
It seems to be caused by here: https://github.com/containers/storage/blob/fab517571265a02325136e63c3cd779c9b3ebc5b/drivers/overlay/overlay.go#L1214
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
That's an unusual path name to be passing to Readlink() unless the "lowers" file for the layer is empty.  Any idea how container "e8db98497af7" was created?

> That's an unusual path name to be passing to Readlink() unless the "lowers" file for the layer is empty. Any idea how container "e8db98497af7" was created?

We are using the Podman HTTP API.
First we pass in volumes and ports and env via `POST /libpod/containers/create`, then we start the container via `POST /libpod/containers/{name}/start`.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
@BlackHole1 are you still seeing this error?
@vrothberg I haven’t been working on this recently, and I haven’t encountered it again since the last time. I will close this issue, and if I encounter it again, I will reopen it.
